response.justification: Bogdan brings roughly 15 years of broad, hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, plus recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators) and a strong track record of sharing knowledge through talks and workshops. However, this role is a Director-level Principal Engineer focused on AI strategy, and the resume shows a senior individual-contributor profile without recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products or platforms at scale, or strategic advisory/leadership experience. The AI exposure is recent and narrow, and there is no advanced AI-related degree. The years-of-experience minimum is met, but the seniority and AI-strategy depth required are not clearly evidenced.
strengths: ~15 years of broad full-stack, embedded, and high-performance backend engineering
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
Strong record of knowledge-sharing via talks, workshops, and open-source projects
concerns: No demonstrated director/principal-level strategic leadership or scope
Lacks recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products/platforms at scale
No advanced AI-related degree and limited cloud-platform strategy experience
